form_description: Sun Outdoors / Sun Retreats Fort Myers Beach booking form. Host info (name, phone, email, resort) is pre-filled in the PDF template as annotations. Only per-booking fields are fillable AcroForm widgets.

Text_1.description: Resort site/lot number from property config (e.g., 110 for Jay, 170 for Minnie)

Text_2.description: Guest first name (orchestrator splits guest_name from booking record)

Text_3.description: Guest last name (orchestrator splits guest_name from booking record)

Text_4._comment: Guest phone not available in Airbnb/VRBO CSV exports

Text_5._comment: Guest email not available in Airbnb/VRBO CSV exports

Text_6.description: Arrival date formatted for the form

Text_7.description: Departure date formatted for the form

Text_8._comment: Platform CSVs (Airbnb/VRBO) do not export guest count. Default 2; operator can override per-booking if needed.
